metadata.title: Orbital Decay
metadata.author: Jack CognitiveE
metadata.description:
PATCH AFTER MULTIVERSE, REQUIRES FUSION 0.1.6+, PATCH IT BEFORE OD
Currently this addon is more based on udeveloped "Legion sidestory" which I wanted to told you, dear people, about rather than other games like once mentioned Crossout. However...
This is what the current version can offer you:
- 2 new factions the members of which are not about to play games with some silly renegades; - 12 Ravagers' weapons that you can either craft or get from absolutely not suspicious containers, also some Slayers' weapons and drones; - 2(6) playable ships + few unlocks
COMING SOON: - uhhh more content
